controls.title: Organisational Context
controls.text: The organisational mission is understood and informs cybersecurity risk management; stakeholders with cybersecurity-related expectations are identified and understood.
controls.evidence_expectation: Mission statement with cybersecurity context; stakeholder register; executive risk appetite statement
controls.assessment_procedure: Review board/executive risk appetite; verify cybersecurity aligned to business mission

controls.title: Asset Management
controls.text: Assets (data, hardware, software, systems, facilities, services, people) that enable the organisation to achieve business purposes are identified and managed consistent with their relative importance to organisational objectives and the organisation's risk strategy.
controls.evidence_expectation: Asset inventory; data classification scheme; CMDB or equivalent
controls.assessment_procedure: Review asset inventory completeness; verify data classified; check ownership assigned

controls.title: Identity Management and Access Control
controls.text: Access to physical and logical assets is limited to authorised users, services, and hardware and managed commensurate with the assessed risk of unauthorised access.
controls.evidence_expectation: IAM policy; MFA enrollment records; access review results; PAM evidence
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify MFA enforced for privileged and remote access; check access reviewed quarterly

controls.title: Continuous Monitoring
controls.text: The organisation monitors assets and network infrastructure for cybersecurity anomalies and indicators of potential cybersecurity events.
controls.evidence_expectation: SIEM deployment evidence; alerting runbooks; SOC coverage schedule
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify 24/7 monitoring coverage; check alerting tuned; review false-positive rate management

controls.title: Incident Management
controls.text: Responses to detected cybersecurity incidents are managed and executed in accordance with the incident management strategy.
controls.evidence_expectation: Incident response plan; tabletop exercise records; incident register
controls.assessment_procedure: Review IRP currency; verify tabletop held within 12 months; check incidents closed with lessons learned

controls.title: Data Security
controls.text: Data are managed consistent with the organisation's risk strategy to protect the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of information, including data at rest and in transit.
controls.evidence_expectation: Encryption policy; data classification scheme; DLP implementation evidence; key management procedure
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify encryption at rest and in transit; check data classification applied; review key management; verify DLP controls active for sensitive data

controls.title: Information Protection Processes and Procedures
controls.text: Security policies, processes, and procedures are maintained and used to manage protection of information systems and assets.
controls.evidence_expectation: Security policy document set; patch management policy; SDLC security integration evidence; configuration management baseline
controls.assessment_procedure: Review policy currency; verify patch management SLAs met; check secure SDLC practices implemented; verify configuration baselines established

controls.title: Risk Assessment
controls.text: The organisation understands the cybersecurity risk to operations, assets, and individuals, and uses that understanding to prioritise protective and detective controls.
controls.evidence_expectation: Risk register with cybersecurity risks; risk assessment methodology; risk treatment decisions; residual risk acceptance records
controls.assessment_procedure: Review risk assessment methodology completeness; check risk register current; verify treatment decisions documented; confirm residual risks accepted by appropriate authority

controls.title: Recovery Planning
controls.text: Recovery processes and procedures are executed and maintained to ensure restoration of systems or assets affected by cybersecurity incidents.
controls.evidence_expectation: Business continuity and disaster recovery plan; BCP test results; RTO/RPO definitions; recovery runbooks
controls.assessment_procedure: Review BCDR plan currency; verify RTO/RPO defined per system; check recovery runbooks tested; confirm last DR test results acceptable

controls.title: Supply Chain Risk Management
controls.text: Cyber supply chain risk management processes are identified, established, managed, monitored, and improved by organisational stakeholders.
controls.evidence_expectation: Supply chain risk management policy; vendor security assessment results; software bill of materials (SBOM); third-party audit reports
controls.assessment_procedure: Review vendor assessment coverage; check SBOM maintained for critical software; verify contractual security requirements with key suppliers; confirm monitoring in place
